content.text: Now let me also check if there's auto-activation during cascades (non-user swaps) or in the simulation.

Only the tap activation remains in input-handler.js — that's the one we want to keep. Done.

Removed the `activateJokers()` function from `match-detector.js` and its call in `findMatches()`. Jokers/wildcards will no longer auto-merge when swapped — they only transform on tap.
